1. rotate_spot(45)
2. move_spot(10)
3. if obstacle_detected_ahead(10):
    rotate_spot(-45)
    move_spot(10)
4. if obstacle_detected_left(10):
    rotate_spot(90)
    move_spot(10)
5. if obstacle_detected_right(10):
    rotate_spot(-90)
    move_spot(10)
6. if target_detected_ahead(10):
    calculate_distance_to_target(10)
    if distance_to_target > 0:
        move_spot(distance_to_target)
        rotate_to_face_target()
7. if at_goal:
    finish_task()
8. if not at_goal and no_clear_path_to_target():
    call_llm()
